name: Void Foundation: Into The Void
short_description: Void Foundation: Into The Void is a JRPG game with SCP & Randomized dungeon exploration element. Void Foundation tells the story of a future world which human history has been rewritten due to the discovery of Void Gate Players will be recruited as void adventurers, discover the secrets of the void.
detailed_description:
Find salvation in death.

Void Foundation: Into The Void is a JRPG game with SCP & Randomized dungeon exploration element.

This game is very heavily inspired by SCP, Made in Abyss, Darkest Dungeon, 40K universe.

In this game, you will play as a void adventurer and join the Void Foundation. You will fight monsters in the void, extract void energy from them, collect monster materials to make equipment, and learn them... But be careful, one wrong step could lead to your death. But don't worry... because...

“Death — does not relieve you from your duty. The Foundation's resurrection technology allows you to start over again and again."

—Military Training Officer, Department of Supervision

"Human beings think that the world behind the door is hell, but they never thought that human greed bring the real hell."

Explore a time when human history was rewritten before World War II when an explorer discovered a Void Gate to the Void. In this new timeline, magic and technology will be taken to another level because of the discovery of the Void.

"Our physical rules do not apply to void monsters. Only weapons and armor made of void monster materials can fight against them."

Collect monster materials and use their powers to fight against them.

"Mutations, drug addiction, permanent injuries, mental breakdown　—　These are all holding you back"

The void itself is dangerous enough, now you have to deal with these problems.

"The research department may produce various research reports and records when studying these monsters."

Even a seemingly weak void monster may have an interesting story behind it.

-------------------------------------------------- -------------
． At least 12-18 hours of gameplay. This does not include all the random events or special side quests you may encounter.

． All kinds of completely random events in the void.   Each journey into the Void is a unique experience.

． There are also fixed events customized for special scenarios.

．A lot of equipment, skills, and passive abilities allows you to customize your character.

．A hardcore experience like Darkest Dungeon.

．An engaging story and captivating world-building.

．Numerous boss battles with unique mechanics; while stats can aid you, using your brain is the key to victory.

．A wealth of branching options, where each play through can lead to different paths and endings.

．You might save your world by playing this game.
